text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the gym...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's it! Let me hear those<n>cheers! Let all
that energy and<n>passion burst out from the
bottom of<n>your hearts!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's what I'm talking about. ♪<n>Now for the
next song! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm met with the bizarre sight of<n>Seeking the
Pearl dancing onstage<n>while surrounded by an
audience of<n>exuberant students.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Um... This is my first time coming to a<n>concert, but
I had such a good time<n>thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, glad to hear it. Your smiles are<n>more
precious to me than any<n>treasure in the world.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You must've stumbled upon my solo<n>show on
accident, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yep. I wanted to awaken the<n>slumbering passion
that's hidden<n>within everyone's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I hold these shows<n>regularly. It's all
to get everyone<n>active and in positive spirits!
choice_data_list: I'm not sure that's how things work...
Well, get on with the show, then!
Well, get on with the show. then!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I hold these shows<n>regularly. It's all
to get everyone<n>active and in positive spirits!
choice_data_list: I'm not sure that's how things work...
Well, get on with the show, then!
Well, get on with the show. then!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You don't believe me? No worries, I<n>won't force
you to.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You can just sit back and let the<n>music carry you
away. Your spirits will<n>be lifted before you know
it.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
This next song will be my last, so let<n>me hear you
cheer like you mean it!<n>Here I go...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Get ready for an exciting<n>show!
